name: Per-Tenant Dashboard (team-01)
description: Service health, latency, error rate, and DB metrics scoped to a single team. Duplicate and change tenant_id filter for each team.

widgets.title: Request Rate (req/min)
widgets.nrql: SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) AS 'req/min' FROM Span WHERE tenant_id = 'team-01' AND span.kind = 'server' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Error Rate (%)
widgets.nrql: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE http.status_code >= 500) AS 'Error %' FROM Span WHERE tenant_id = 'team-01' AND span.kind = 'server' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: P50 / P95 / P99 Latency (ms)
widgets.nrql: SELECT percentile(duration.ms, 50, 95, 99) FROM Span WHERE tenant_id = 'team-01' AND span.kind = 'server' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Active Pods
widgets.nrql: SELECT uniqueCount(k8s.pod.name) AS 'Running Pods' FROM Metric WHERE cluster = 'hrs-platform' AND k8s.namespace.name = 'team-01' AND k8s.pod.status = 'Running' SINCE 5 minutes ago

widgets.title: Container CPU Usage
widgets.nrql: SELECT average(k8s.container.cpuUsedCores) AS 'CPU Cores' FROM Metric WHERE cluster = 'hrs-platform' AND k8s.namespace.name = 'team-01' FACET k8s.container.name TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Container Memory Usage (MiB)
widgets.nrql: SELECT average(k8s.container.memoryUsedBytes) / 1048576 AS 'MiB' FROM Metric WHERE cluster = 'hrs-platform' AND k8s.namespace.name = 'team-01' FACET k8s.container.name TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: DB Query Duration P99 (ms)
widgets.nrql: SELECT percentile(duration.ms, 99) AS 'P99 ms' FROM Span WHERE tenant_id = 'team-01' AND db.system = 'postgresql' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: DB Error Count
widgets.nrql: SELECT count(*) AS 'DB Errors' FROM Span WHERE tenant_id = 'team-01' AND db.system = 'postgresql' AND otel.status_code = 'ERROR' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Slowest DB Queries
widgets.nrql: SELECT average(duration.ms) AS 'Avg ms', max(duration.ms) AS 'Max ms', count(*) AS 'Count', db.statement FROM Span WHERE tenant_id = 'team-01' AND db.system = 'postgresql' FACET db.statement SINCE 1 hour ago ORDER BY 'Avg ms' DESC LIMIT 10
